'''Arbor Industries''' was a scientific research company founded by [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]. It produced the antidotes to many deadly diseases that plagued countless worlds—most of which Arbor Industries started itself. Its headquarters were located on Zan Arbor's homeworld of [[Ventrux]], but were shut down when she moved her studies to [[Simpla-12]]. It was not completely gone, however, when it was discovered near the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] that Arbor Industries was behind a deadly gas used to devastate the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] moon of [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]] as well used in [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray's]] [[Mechno-chair/Legends|mechno-chair]] as an emergency defense mechanism.
